assignment: Create a non-destructive v2 checkpoint for the already probed structured-cancellation conclusion. Preserve the substantive decision and add the complete executable DKR identity, evidence, freshness, and wall structure before independent validation.
required_checks: Do not overwrite checkpoint.json; write checkpoint.v2.json.
Add contract_version, type, and unit_id and validate against the executable DKR checkpoint contract.
Resolve every evidence hash to a named current source or governed worker artifact.
Give every active wall a numeric value, fresh timestamp, distinct evidence_ref and verification_record_ref, and an honest pending validator verdict.
Update the saved replay so it validates v2 completeness as well as the existing behavior.
Keep downstream advance blocked and do not self-accept.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Changing the signal-only decision, adding a public cancel or task surface, or weakening a wall
terminal_condition: Finish when v2 behavior and checkpoint completeness replay, all hashes resolve, and independent validation remains the only acceptance gate.
